purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Logging polish, monitoring polish and Admin/Ansible foundation completed. Mini Support Desk works through web -> app; product logs are visible in Loki/Grafana; app product metrics are scraped by Prometheus; Grafana dashboard and alert rules are implemented/tested; admin is now a working Ansible control node with SSH keys to managed nodes, full inventory, ansible.cfg, operational playbooks and Git history.
last_completed_stage: Admin/Ansible foundation: SSH key-based access admin -> web/app/log/monitor, full inventory, ansible all/managed ping, control-node structure, ansible.cfg, playbooks ping_all/check_services/restart_app/deploy_prometheus_rules, Git repo with initial commits
current_next_stage: Product model v2: add resource/category fields, active/resolved ticket separation, resolved_at, history-oriented API behavior, prepare /api/v1/* transition
progress_estimate: expanded roadmap formal progress 11/21 stages completed (~52%); core infrastructure lab stages 1-10 completed; Admin/Ansible foundation completed; engineering readiness for expanded production-like scope 58-63%; current core demo readiness 85-88%
